## Type of Change
<!-- Please check the one that applies to this PR using "x". -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Visual Changes (Screenshots)

## Strict Testing & Verification Checklist
<!-- You must check all the boxes below before your PR will be reviewed. -->
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) document.
- [ ] My code follows the existing style and architecture of the project.
- [ ] I have run `uv run pytest` and **ALL TESTS PASS** locally.
- [ ] I have manually verified the app still launches successfully via `uv run giteyes`.
- [ ] If I added a new feature or fixed a bug, I have added accompanying tests.
- [ ] I have not introduced any live network calls to the GitHub API within the test suite.
